Ex Parte Hearing (On The Record)
Off Calendar Dec-21-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly for ex parte application regarding Defendant DaimlerChrysler's CCP 170.6 peremptory challenge as to Judge Wiss.

Appearances:
PHILIP HARLEY, Esq., Paul Hanley & Harley, (510) 559-9980, on behalf of plaintiffs and opposing party
EVAN NELSON, Esq., Thelen Reid & Priest LLP, (415) 371-1200, on behalf of defendant DaimlerChrysler and moving party.

This matter is addressing PHH Group #67. The two remaining cases are #427192 consolidated with case #427975. The issue regarding defendant DaimlerChrysler's CCP 170.6 peremptory challenge as to Judge Wiss as timely was argued. Having heard oral arguments, the Court granted the peremtory challenge of defendant DaimlerChrysler as to Judge Wiss.

The Court ordered the cases be put back on the trial calendar for 1/3/06 at 11:15 a.m. in Dept. 206.

Hon. Robert L. Dondero; Clerk: V.Mu; Reporter: Karen Farnsworth (206)
